title: veronicastrum axillare
intro: Veronicastrum axillare, also known as the Chinese foxglove, is a flowering plant in the bignonia family native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a vasodilator. The health benefits of Veronicastrum axillare include its potential to reduce cardiovascular disease risk, improve blood flow, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, with some studies also exploring its potential as a pharmaceutical agent.
